requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2

summary.en: A Guinea national EV connector mandate could not be confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14. For any IEC-aligned, Francophone, donor-funded, fleet, mining, hotel, or public charging project, the practical connector direction should be assumed to be IEC 62196-2 Type 2 for AC charging and IEC 62196-3 Combo 2 (CCS2) for DC fast charging unless the tender says otherwise. IEC 62196 connector conformity becomes mandatory when written into INGM-referenced standards, EDG connection documents, site-owner specifications, or procurement requirements.
summary.zh: 截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方来源确认几内亚全国电动汽车接口强制规则。对于任何IEC体系、法语区、援助资金、车队、矿区、酒店或公共充电项目，除非招标文件另有规定，实务上应假定接口方向为交流IEC 62196-2 Type 2和直流IEC 62196-3 Combo 2（CCS2）。当IEC 62196接口符合性写入IGNM引用标准、EDG接入文件、场地方规范或采购要求时，即成为强制项目要求。
summary.zht: 截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方來源確認幾內亞全國電動汽車接口強制規則。對於任何IEC體系、法語區、援助資金、車隊、礦區、酒店或公共充電項目，除非招標文件另有規定，實務上應假定接口方向為交流IEC 62196-2 Type 2和直流IEC 62196-3 Combo 2（CCS2）。當IEC 62196接口符合性寫入IGNM引用標準、EDG接入文件、場地方規範或採購要求時，即成為強制項目要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for a.c. pin and contact-tube accessories
IEC 62196-3 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for DC and AC/DC pin and contact-tube vehicle couplers
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment
Project tender, importer, fleet, or mining-site specification to be confirmed

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers. Although the GB/T 20234.2 AC coupler resembles IEC 62196 Type 2 in outline, connector gender, contact arrangement, proximity signaling, and control behavior differ. GB/T 20234.3 DC couplers are geometrically different from CCS2 and use GB/T 27930 CAN communication rather than the CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 communication stack.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。尽管GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器外形类似IEC 62196 Type 2，但接口性别、触点排列、接近信号和控制行为均不同。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器与CCS2几何形状不同，并使用GB/T 27930 CAN通信，而不是CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。儘管GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器外形類似IEC 62196 Type 2，但接口性別、觸點排列、接近信號和控制行為均不同。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器與CCS2幾何形狀不同，並使用GB/T 27930 CAN通訊，而不是CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.2-2015 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: AC charging coupler
GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler
GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system for electric vehicles
GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: A GB/T-only China charger is not connector-ready for a likely IEC 62196 Guinea project. Conversion requires hardware redesign of the coupler, cable assembly, locking system, PP / CP signaling, DC communication stack, labels, temperature-rise evidence, spare parts, and maintenance training. Adapters should not be treated as a compliance substitute. Confirm the required connector standard in the project specification before quoting or shipping.
gap.zh: 仅支持GB/T的中国充电桩不适用于几内亚可能采用的IEC 62196项目。转换需要对耦合器、电缆组件、锁止系统、PP / CP信号、直流通信栈、标签、温升证据、备件和维护培训进行硬件重新设计。转接器不应视为合规替代方案。报价或发货前须确认项目规范要求的接口标准。
gap.zht: 僅支持GB/T的中國充電樁不適用於幾內亞可能採用的IEC 62196項目。轉換需要對耦合器、電纜組件、鎖止系統、PP / CP信號、直流通訊棧、標籤、溫升證據、備件和維護培訓進行硬體重新設計。轉接器不應視為合規替代方案。報價或發貨前須確認項目規範要求的接口標準。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 is mandatory where specified by tender, importer, EDG/site documentation, or project owner; no Guinea-wide EV connector mandate was confirmed
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat connector conversion as hardware and protocol redesign. For Guinea projects using the IEC / Francophone direction, GB/T connectors cannot be plugged into IEC 62196 vehicle inlets and cannot be made compliant by paperwork alone.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将接口转换视为硬件和协议重新设计。对于采用IEC / 法语区方向的几内亚项目，GB/T接口无法插入IEC 62196车辆接口，也不能仅靠文件实现合规。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將接口轉換視為硬體和協議重新設計。對於採用IEC / 法語區方向的幾內亞項目，GB/T接口無法插入IEC 62196車輛接口，也不能僅靠文件實現合規。
